description: Workflow simplification — Phase 3.1 Quality verification removed (folded into 2.2 + 3.4). Phase Index 1.3 label normalized.
changelog:
**Refactor:**
- workflow.md: Phase 3.1 Quality verification removed. Its two unique value points (full-scope final check + spec-sync trigger) folded into Phase 2.2 (last 2.2 must run full-scope via `--mode packages`) and Phase 3.4 (commit preamble asking if spec sync is needed). Step numbering kept stable (3.1 left as a numbered gap) to avoid breaking external references.
- workflow.md: Phase Index 1.3 `Configure context` label normalized from non-standard `[conditional · once]` to `[required · once]` with `sub-agent-dispatch-platforms-only` annotation, matching step body. The `[conditional]` tag was a single-use label that no other step used.
- marketplace workflows `native`, `tdd`, `channel-driven-subagent-dispatch` updated in lockstep with the main workflow template.
- Bundled `devflow-meta` skill `change-workflow.md` status transition example updated to reflect new Phase 3 numbering.
- Copilot `finish-work.prompt.md` Phase 3 ASCII flow refreshed.

No source code changed. This is a docs-only refactor that propagates through `devflow update` template refresh.
notes:
Docs-only refactor. Run `devflow update` to refresh `.devflow/workflow.md`, the devflow-meta bundled skill, and (for Copilot users) the finish-work prompt. No `--migrate` needed; no breaking change.

Install: `npm install -g @enpd/devflow`
